positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. The composition should feature clean silhouettes of various flora and fauna against a gradient sky (deep indigo fading to soft coral and peach). Central subjects include stylized deer leaping gracefully and large, fantastical glowing mushrooms. The style is detailed vector illustration combined with the aesthetic of negative-space engraving, emphasizing strong outlines and contrasting colors. The composition must be perfectly centered and easily readable on fabric. High contrast, clean lines, tattoo flash style, vibrant but limited color palette.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, multiple figures, poor anatomy, messy lines, low detail, amateur drawing, gradient noise
